query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `organizations` (`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `contact_person` varchar(100), `contact_phone` varchar(50), `contact_email` varchar(200), `status` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `remark` text, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `organizations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
